mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.provider_id, p.name as provider_name, t.trigger_type, t.status, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.duration, t.channel_count, t.error_message, t.raw_content, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM m3u8_refresh_task t LEFT JOIN m3u8_providers p ON t.provider_id = p.id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m3u8_refresh_task ( provider_id, trigger_type, status, start_time, end_time, duration, channel_count, error_message, raw_content, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{providerId}, #{triggerType}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{channelCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{rawContent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE m3u8_refresh_task SET provider_id = #{providerId}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, channel_count = #{channelCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, raw_content = #{rawContent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
